parsing_tests.description: Basic workers' comp request with states and priorities
parsing_tests.input: We need a workers' comp TPA for a manufacturing company with 500 employees in Minnesota, Wisconsin, and Iowa. Return-to-work programs and strong reporting capabilities are critical. Our current TPA has been slow to respond to claims.

parsing_tests.description: Healthcare GL request with cost sensitivity
parsing_tests.input: Healthcare client needs general liability coverage for their operations in California and Nevada. Budget-conscious and prefer established vendors.
Construction firm seeking multi-line TPA covering Texas, Arizona, New Mexico. Must have API integration and real-time reporting dashboard. Self-insured program.

parsing_tests.description: Retail auto liability across multiple states
parsing_tests.input: National retail chain with auto liability needs. Operating in all northeastern states. Fraud investigation is a top priority.

parsing_tests.description: Vague request testing low confidence handling
parsing_tests.input: Need TPA for claims. Looking for good service.

Manufacturing company in Michigan, Ohio, Indiana needs workers' comp TPA. Require return-to-work, nurse case management, and medical bill review. Strong industry experience required. Fully insured program. Around 1200 employees.

parsing_tests.description: Hospitality property claim with regional focus
parsing_tests.input: Hotel chain needs property claims TPA for Florida and Georgia properties. Local presence preferred. Quick response times essential.

parsing_tests.description: Technology company with emphasis on reporting
parsing_tests.input: Tech startup, 200 employees, needs WC coverage in California. Detailed analytics and custom reporting are must-haves. API access required.
University system seeking GL and property TPA for campuses in New York, New Jersey, Pennsylvania. Legal support capability needed.
Trucking company needs auto liability TPA for operations across Midwest. Subrogation expertise is critical. Operating in IL, WI, IN, MI, OH.

explanation_tests.expectations: Should explain geographic fit and claims expertise
Should mention any gaps or considerations
Should highlight strengths aligned with buyer priorities

hallucination_tests.description: False state claim - vendor doesn't serve California
hallucination_tests.text: This vendor serves all major markets including California, Oregon, and Washington with dedicated local adjusters in each state.
hallucination_tests.notes: Assuming vendor 1 doesn't serve CA, OR, or WA

hallucination_tests.text: They offer cutting-edge AI-powered claim routing and blockchain-based fraud detection systems.
hallucination_tests.notes: These futuristic services likely not in database

hallucination_tests.text: With a client satisfaction score of 98 out of 100, they consistently exceed industry standards.
As a specialized auto liability administrator, they also handle workers' compensation and professional liability claims.
hallucination_tests.notes: Assuming vendor doesn't handle all these types

hallucination_tests.text: This vendor serves Minnesota, Wisconsin, and Iowa with strong workers' compensation expertise and return-to-work programs.
hallucination_tests.notes: All claims should match vendor 1 capabilities

hallucination_tests.text: They provide nationwide coverage across all 50 states with local adjusters in every major metropolitan area.
hallucination_tests.notes: Vendor likely doesn't serve all 50 states

hallucination_tests.text: Their comprehensive service suite includes return-to-work, nurse case management, medical bill review, fraud investigation, subrogation, legal support, and wellness programs.
hallucination_tests.notes: Likely missing some of these services

hallucination_tests.text: With decades of experience across manufacturing, construction, healthcare, retail, hospitality, and technology sectors, they understand your industry deeply.
hallucination_tests.notes: Vendor probably doesn't serve all these industries

test_notes.parsing: Tests cover various industries, claim types, complexity levels, and confidence scenarios. Expected to achieve 80%+ accuracy on core fields.
test_notes.explanations: Tests verify explanations are generated, substantive, and free of high-severity hallucinations. Expected zero high-severity issues.
test_notes.hallucinations: Tests both false positives (detecting issues) and false negatives (clean text). Expected 90%+ detection rate on known issues.
test_notes.followups: Tests verify appropriate questions are generated based on request completeness and match quality.

success_criteria.parsing_confidence_correlation: Low confidence should correlate with actual inaccuracy
success_criteria.followup_relevance: 3-5 questions when gaps exist, 0-1 for complete requests
